boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.

checks.detail: CLI wiring and bundled deterministic calculations.
checks.name: selfcheck

checks.detail: Public wording, secret marker, and finance boundary scan.
checks.name: public_scan

checks.detail: Holdings, assumptions, and scenario preset validation.
checks.name: fixture_doctor

checks.detail: Package metadata, data files, dependencies, and command coverage.
checks.name: package_audit

release_owner_actions: tests: resolve status not-run from python -m unittest discover -s tests
